timeline.title: Founded in New Orleans
timeline.description: Jim Huger founded Premium Parking in June 2005, just two months before Hurricane Katrina.

timeline.title: Ben Montgomery Joins
timeline.description: Ben Montgomery joins as President with the goal of growing Premium through operational excellence.

timeline.title: Technology Pivot
timeline.description: Built our own mobile app and launched text-to-pay parking. The beginning of GLIDEPARCS®.

timeline.title: Gateless Revolution
timeline.description: Tested gateless free-flow model. The gateless lot outperformed the gated one. GLIDEPARCS® was born.

timeline.title: Garages at Scale
timeline.description: Expanded gateless operations to garages, including a major 1,600-space facility.

timeline.title: Contactless Acceleration
timeline.description: Pandemic accelerated demand for contactless payments. QR codes and digital workflows refined.

timeline.title: India GCC Opens
timeline.description: Premium Parking opens international office in Hyderabad, India — a global technology hub.
